hero.title: Naruto Shippūden
hero.overview: After two and a half years of intense training with the legendary Sannin Jiraiya, Naruto Uzumaki returns to the Hidden Leaf Village. But the world has changed — the Akatsuki organization is hunting Jinchuriki, and his best friend Sasuke has fallen deeper into darkness. Naruto must now protect his home, save his friend, and uncover the truth about the ninja world's troubled history. This is the story of a boy growing into a hero, facing powerful enemies, and learning what it truly means to become Hokage.

hero.title: One Piece
hero.overview: Gol D. Roger, the King of the Pirates, left behind the world's greatest treasure — the One Piece. Years later, Monkey D. Luffy dreams of becoming the next Pirate King. With his rubber powers from eating a Devil Fruit and a crew of misfits, he sails the Grand Line. Together they face marine admirals, rival pirates, and world-shaking conspiracies. This epic tale is about freedom, friendship, and chasing your dreams no matter the cost.

hero.title: Attack on Titan
hero.overview: After a century of peace behind massive walls, humanity is once again attacked by the man-eating Titans. Eren Yeager watches as his mother is devoured, sparking a burning desire for revenge. He joins the Survey Corps to fight back and uncover the truth about the Titans' origin. But the deeper he digs, the darker the secrets become — and the line between friend and foe blurs. This is a brutal story of survival, betrayal, and the cost of freedom.

hero.title: Death Note
hero.overview: Brilliant but bored high school student Light Yagami finds a supernatural notebook dropped by the death god Ryuk. Anyone whose name is written in it dies. Light decides to become the god of a new world by killing criminals, while the world's greatest detective, L, tries to stop him. What follows is a high-stakes cat-and-mouse game of wits, justice, and morality. Is Light a hero or a villain? The Death Note will make you question everything.

hero.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
hero.overview: Tanjiro Kamado returns home one day to find his entire family slaughtered by demons. His sister Nezuko survives — but she has been turned into a demon herself. Determined to find a cure and avenge his family, Tanjiro joins the Demon Slayer Corps. Armed with water breathing techniques and guided by loyalty, he battles terrifying demons while searching for the demon king, Muzan Kibutsuji. This emotional journey is about love, loss, and the unbreakable bond between siblings.

anime.title: Witch Hat Atelier
anime.overview: In a world where only witches can cast magic, they must avoid being seen by ordinary people while casting. While Coco does her chores, she daydreams of becoming a witch. When a young witch named Qifrey visits her village, Coco uncovers the “absolute secret,” becomes Qifrey’s apprentice, and begins her studies. This is the story of children who encounter despair, yet reach out toward hope.
